languages.text: Редитийцы Заркова почитают аугменты и с радостью устанавливают новые. Воздвигните священные цехи-капеллы аугментики, где почитаются их дух.

traits.locale_text: Редитийцы Заркова почитают аугменты и с радостью устанавливают новые. Воздвигните священные цехи-капеллы аугментики, где почитаются их дух.

languages.text: Дабы разжечь пыл подданных и укрепить их верность, Вольный Торговец выделит средства на возведение капелл, где зарковцы смогут молиться древним аугментациям, дарованным им еще во времена Первого Призыва. Приглашенные техножрецы из флотилии Эксплораторов будут следить за сохранностью священного железа и читать над ним литании укрепления металла.

traits.locale_text: Часть зарковцев с трепетом и благоговением относится к аугментациям. В каждом поселении Заркова построят храмы, посвященные имплантам.

languages.text: To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.
languages.original_text: Дабы разжечь пыл подданных и укрепить их верность, Вольный Торговец выделит средства на возведение капелл, где зарковцы смогут молиться древним аугментациям, дарованным им еще во времена Первого Призыва. Приглашенные техножрецы из флотилии Эксплораторов будут следить за сохранностью священного железа и читать над ним литании укрепления металла.

traits.locale_text: To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Invited Tech-Priests from the Explorator Flotilla shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortitude over it.

Invited Tech-Priests from the Explorator Flotilla shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortitude over it.

To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.

To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.

languages.text: Para fomentar el fervor de los súbditos y reforzar su devoción, {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente asignará fondos para la construcción de santuarios donde los zarkovianos podrán rezar ante los antiguos aumentos que les fueron otorgados durante el primer llamado. Los tecnosacerdotes invitados de la Flota Exploradora mantendrán el sagrado metal, recitando letanías fortificantes.
languages.original_text: To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.

traits.locale_text: Para fomentar el fervor de los súbditos y reforzar su devoción, {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente asignará fondos para la construcción de santuarios donde los zarkovianos podrán rezar ante los antiguos aumentos que les fueron otorgados durante el primer llamado. Los tecnosacerdotes invitados de la Flota Exploradora mantendrán el sagrado metal, recitando letanías fortificantes.

languages.text: 为点燃臣民的热忱，巩固他们的信仰，行商浪人将划拨资金修建圣所，让扎尔科夫人可以在那里向初代征召者时期赠与他们的古老植入物祈祷。从开拓者舰队邀请来的技术神甫们将维护这些圣铁，并为其诵念钢铁强化的祷文。
languages.original_text: To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.

traits.locale_text: 为点燃臣民的热忱，巩固他们的信仰，行商浪人将划拨资金修建圣所，让扎尔科夫人可以在那里向初代征召者时期赠与他们的古老植入物祈祷。从开拓者舰队邀请来的技术神甫们将维护这些圣铁，并为其诵念钢铁强化的祷文。

languages.text: Afin de nourrir le zèle de ses sujets et de renforcer leur dévouement, {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} allouera des fonds à la construction d'autels devant lesquels les Zarkoviens pourront vénérer les antiques augmentations reçues lors de la Première Mobilisation. Les technoprêtres venus de la Flotte des Explorators entretiendront le fer sacré et réciteront les litanies de fortification d'usage.
languages.original_text: To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.

traits.locale_text: Afin de nourrir le zèle de ses sujets et de renforcer leur dévouement, {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} allouera des fonds à la construction d'autels devant lesquels les Zarkoviens pourront vénérer les antiques augmentations reçues lors de la Première Mobilisation. Les technoprêtres venus de la Flotte des Explorators entretiendront le fer sacré et réciteront les litanies de fortification d'usage.

languages.text: Tebaanın şevkini ateşlemek ve bağlılıklarını pekiştirmek için Hür Tacir, Zarkovluların İlk Sevk Grubu sırasında kendilerine bahşedilen kadim ogmentlere dua edebilecekleri tapınakların inşası için kaynak ayıracak. Keşiftör Filosu'ndan davet edilen Tekno Rahipler, kutsal demirin bakımını yapacak ve üzerinde metal sağlamlaştırma ilahileri okuyacak.
languages.original_text: To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.

traits.locale_text: Tebaanın şevkini ateşlemek ve bağlılıklarını pekiştirmek için Hür Tacir, Zarkovluların İlk Sevk Grubu sırasında kendilerine bahşedilen kadim ogmentlere dua edebilecekleri tapınakların inşası için kaynak ayıracak. Keşiftör Filosu'ndan davet edilen Tekno Rahipler, kutsal demirin bakımını yapacak ve üzerinde metal sağlamlaştırma ilahileri okuyacak.

languages.text: ザルコビアンが最初の徴兵時に授かった古代の強化を祈るための祠の建設に資金を充て、彼らの熱意を高め、彼らの献身性を強化する。探査艦隊から招かれたテクプリストが聖なる鉄を維持し、その上に金属強化の祈祷文を唱える。
languages.original_text: To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.

traits.locale_text: ザルコビアンが最初の徴兵時に授かった古代の強化を祈るための祠の建設に資金を充て、彼らの熱意を高め、彼らの献身性を強化する。探査艦隊から招かれたテクプリストが聖なる鉄を維持し、その上に金属強化の祈祷文を唱える。

languages.text: Um den Eifer {mf|seiner|ihrer} Untertanen zu entfachen und ihre Hingabe zu stärken, wird {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} Mittel für die Errichtung von Schreinen bereitstellen, an denen die Zarkovianer zu den alten Augmentationen beten können, die sie während der Ersten Einberufung erhielten. Von der Exploratorflotte eingeladene Techpriester werden das heilige Eisen warten und Litaneien der metallenen Befestigung anstimmen.
languages.original_text: To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.
